## Checklist (Definition of Done)

- [ ] Commits are atomic and follow Conventional Commits
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run format:check` passes
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run test` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] A Changeset was added (`npx changeset`) if user-facing behavior changed
- [ ] The living context doc (`.github/copilot-instructions.md`) was updated
- [ ] No live Codex/VLM calls were added to CI (CI stays fully mocked)
